incidents.description: Anomalous API call pattern detected from service account
Unauthorized access attempt to production database

post_mortems.author: SRE Team
post_mortems.summary: Unauthorized access attempt blocked by IAM policy. Source IP traced to known scanner. No data exposure. WAF rule updated.
post_mortems.root_cause: Missing rate limiting on API endpoint
post_mortems.remediation: Deployed WAF rate limiting rule, rotated affected credentials
